  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Gas flex connector routed through a cabinet wall, which is a code violation due to risk of abrasion and damage."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the gas flex connector from the cabinet wall penetration.",
    "Install a rigid black iron pipe nipple through the cabinet wall to the exterior of the cabinet.",
    "Connect the flexible gas connector to the rigid pipe outside of the cabinet enclosure."
  ],
  "rationale": "Flexible gas connectors are not permitted to pass through appliance housings, cabinet walls, partitions, ceilings, or floors. The penetration must be made with rigid pipe, and the flexible connector must remain entirely within the same room or enclosure as the appliance.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC 411.1.3.3",
    "IRC G2422.1.2.3",
    "IPC 504",
    "IRC P2804"
  ]
}
